# Software environments

## R packages (R 4.5.2)
- `dplyr`
- `ggplot2` 
- `tidyr` 
- PRSice.R dependencies : `optparse`, `data.table`, `RColorBrewer`, `methods`, `tools`


## Python packages (Python 3.12.0)
- `pandas`
- `numpy` 
- `scipy` 
- `statsmodels` 
- `matplotlib`
- `seaborn` 
- `openpyxl` 
- `plotly` 

## Tools
- `Nextflow` + `nf-core/sarek` (v3.5.1)
- `Ensembl VEP` 
- `bcftools` 
- `htslib` 
- `gawk` 
- `mosdepth` 
- `plink2`  
- `liftOver` 
- `PRSice-2` (v2.3.3) 
- `somalier` (v0.2.19)
